notes: v1.14.83 - Redesign Step 1 correction: mode toggle now TAKES OVER the viewport instead of overlaying. redesign_initToggle() hides the live 5-tab nav and calls showMode('command') so pg-cmd replaces pg-triage (the profile bar + Today dashboard live inside pg-triage and hide with it). Plus two fixes the symptom masked: (1) showMode suppresses nav_push via _navInternalCall so the scaffold never contaminates session-restore state (otherwise turning redesign off would replay p:'cmd' onto the live app); (2) the 700ms session-restore early-returns while the redesign flag is on, so it can't race the takeover or pop a resume banner over the scaffold. Still nothing re-homed - shells remain empty stubs. Flag-gated (?redesign=1); field app untouched.
